'''Archais''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Interior Region of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Sometime before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] lieutenant colonel [[Freja Covell]] and the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]] fought three Rebel [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForces]] units in the oriental seas of Archais during the [[battle of Archais]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> It was believed to be the site of mythical mountain peaks that were very high. On occasion, reference was made to these peaks as a form of hyperbole, such as the suggestion that if [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Bandor (Moff)|Bandor's]] ambition were height, it would tower over the peaks.<ref name="GC">''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
